## Summary

Describe the problem or opportunity.

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior you want to see.

## Use Case

Explain who benefits and how the feature would be used.

## Alternatives Considered

List any workarounds or alternative approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, examples, or related links if helpful.
